title: HTML Resume Template
scenario: Write a prompt that generates an HTML template for a resume with the following sections: Education, Work Experience, Skills, and Achievements. The template should use Bootstrap CSS and include a hero section with the person's name and a photo. The template should be under 500 lines of code.
constraints: Must include Education and Work Experience sections
Hero section should include person's name and photo
Must be under 500 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the HTML template has the required sections and they are in the correct order.
Check if the HTML template includes Bootstrap CSS.
Check if the hero section includes the person's name and photo.
Check if the HTML template is under 500 lines of code.
